# iosxe_monitor_session (Resource)

This resource can manage the Monitor Session configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "iosxe_monitor_session" "example" {
  session_id = 1
  destination_interface = [
    {
      name          = "HundredGigE1/0/1"
      encapsulation = "replicate"
    }
  ]
  source_interface = [
    {
      name      = "HundredGigE1/0/2"
      direction = "both"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `session_id` (Number) - Range: `1`-`66`

### Optional

- `destination_interface` (Attributes List) SPAN destination interface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_interface))
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `source_interface` (Attributes List) SPAN source interface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source_interface))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The path of the object.

<a id="nestedatt--destination_interface"></a>
### Nested Schema for `destination_interface`

Required:

- `name` (String) Interface Name

Optional:

- `encapsulation` (String) Set encapsulation for destination interface
  - Choices: `dot1q`, `isl`, `replicate`


<a id="nestedatt--source_interface"></a>
### Nested Schema for `source_interface`

Required:

- `name` (String) Interface Name

Optional:

- `direction` (String) - Choices: `both`, `rx`, `tx`

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import iosxe_monitor_session.example "<session_id>"
```
